summary: Implementation plan for unifying the narrative pipeline by transitioning from hardcoded biography-only phase planning to a data-driven, config-based architecture. Covers 5 components: Style JSON v2 with pipeline_features flags, Battle Phase Plan + Validate Sub-key prompts, Code wiring in rewriter.py (dispatch maps, research sections, blueprint extraction), Engine config detection replacing _is_biography hardcode in script_creation_tab.py, and Niche Config v2 with appropriate word counts. Includes detailed gap analysis, backward compatibility safeguards, and verification plan.
